race.description: Ladbrokes Racing Extras In Multi Maiden Plate
race.comment: PARTY DAY (6) resumes owning two easy trial wins at the track. Just missed at Hobart two back and went close over this trip at her only go on this surface. Will be naturally improved and looks ready to go. UNA PALOMA BLANCA (7) has been racing well without winning. Keeps the top hoop and draws inside. She deserves another chance. FLYING HOME (10) debuts with a 2kg claim and has looked sharp at the trials. Profiles well and the betting will be key. TIKKEN (3) has switched from a Victorian stable and has trialled well here for his return. Jumps from the rail and has the ability. The betting will tell plenty with him as well. FIERCE SPIRIT (9) will show more third-up.
